headline: Molson Coors Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Pricing and Sales Mix
summary: TAP' Q1 2026 earnings and sales beat forecasts as pricing and mix offset volume declines and fuel Horizon 2030 moves.

raw.headline: Molson Coors Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Pricing and Sales Mix
raw.summary: TAP' Q1 2026 earnings and sales beat forecasts as pricing and mix offset volume declines and fuel Horizon 2030 moves.

headline: Molson Coors Warns Of 6% To 9% Volume Drop On Glass Pinch
summary: The brewer expects second-quarter volume pressure from glass supplier challenges while keeping its full-year financial targets intact.

raw.headline: Molson Coors Warns Of 6% To 9% Volume Drop On Glass Pinch
raw.summary: The brewer expects second-quarter volume pressure from glass supplier challenges while keeping its full-year financial targets intact.

headline: Needham Maintains Buy on Molson Coors Beverage, Lowers Price Target to $50
summary: Needham  analyst Gerald Pascarelli   maintains Molson Coors Beverage (NYSE:TAP) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $52 to $50.

raw.headline: Needham Maintains Buy on Molson Coors Beverage, Lowers Price Target to $50
